overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character walking through a scenic coastal landscape. The character travels from a cliff overlooking the ocean, through rolling grasslands, and along a dirt path beside a stone cliff face. The lighting suggests early morning with warm sunlight and partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlooking ocean and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along grassy cliff edge overlooking the ocean

entered.detail: calm blue ocean stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
mountain range with snow-capped peaks visible across the water
large rocky outcrops and cliffs along the coastline
green grass covering the cliff top where the character walks
prominent moss-covered rock formation on the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a scenic coastal vista with the character walking along a grassy cliff overlooking a vast ocean. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distant background across the water, while rocky formations dot the coastline. The morning sun casts warm light across the terrain as the character moves steadily forward along the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling grassland hills with scattered trees and inland water

events.description: character turns inland away from the coast, ocean exits view and landscape opens into grassy hills

agents.ego_description: turning right to head inland through rolling grassy hills, moving away from the coastal cliff

entered.detail: undulating green hills stretching into the distance
individual trees dotting the landscape with fresh spring foliage
calm body of water nestled in the valley between hills
distant stone structures suggesting old settlements or ruins

segments.scene_description: The character turns inland away from the coast, transitioning from the cliff edge to rolling grassland terrain. The ocean and distant mountains exit view, replaced by undulating green hills, scattered trees, and a small pond visible in the valley. The character continues walking through this open pastoral landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path along steep stone cliff face

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to dirt path alongside a tall stone cliff wall

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow winding dirt path with tall stone cliff wall on the right side

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding along the base of the cliff
steep vertical rock wall rising prominently on the right side
weathered wooden posts and rails lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character descends onto a narrow dirt path that winds along the base of a steep stone cliff. The open grassland gives way to this more enclosed trail, with a tall rock face on the right and a simple wooden fence on the left. The path continues forward between the cliff and the grassy slope as the character maintains a steady walking pace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive coastal vista into a confined trail along a stone cliff. It begins with the character walking along a grassy cliff edge overlooking a vast ocean and distant snow-capped mountains under the warm glow of the morning sun. As the character turns inland, the coastal view recedes and the scene opens into a pastoral landscape of undulating green hills, scattered trees, and a small valley pond. The environment then shifts as the character descends from the open grasslands onto a narrow dirt path. Finally, the vista closes in, leaving the character to walk between a towering rock face on the right and a simple wooden fence on the left.
